transcript: Speaker A: India mein English seekhne ka market 20,000 crore rupaye se bhi zyada ka hai. Jisme online courses, apps, coaching institutes aur digital videos se log paisa kama rahe hain. But the question is, India mein almost 10-15% log hi comfortably English bol paate hain. Aisa kyun? Problem yeh hai na ki teachers ya digital courses grammar, sentences aur English ke rules to sikha dete hain, lekin actual communication practice kiske sath karoge? Aur isi problem ko solve kiya hai MySivi AI ke founders ne. Is app mein aap 24x7 AI teacher ke sath English mein baat kar sakte ho. AI aapki mistakes turant correct karta hai, basically ek spoken English practice partner milta hai logon ko. And not just AI, is app mein aap dusre learners ke sath bhi live connect karke spoken English practice kar sakte ho taaki aapki real-life situations mein English bolne ki practice ho jaaye. Anybody can try, ek rupe ka trial hai inka bas. Already 50 lakh downloads hain inke MySivi AI ke. [In India, the market for learning English is over 20,000 crore rupees. In which people are making money from online courses, apps, coaching institutes, and digital videos. But the question is, why can only almost 10-15% of people in India speak English comfortably? Why is that? The problem is that teachers or digital courses teach grammar, sentences, and English rules, but who will you practice actual communication with? And this problem has been solved by the founders of MySivi AI. In this app, you can talk in English with an AI teacher 24x7. The AI corrects your mistakes instantly, basically people get a spoken English practice partner. And not just AI, in this app, you can also connect live with other learners to practice spoken English so that you get practice speaking English in real-life situations. Anybody can try, they have a trial for just one rupee. They already have 50 lakh downloads of MySivi AI.]
on_screen_text: English Learning Market in India Over ₹20,000 Crore! Online courses, apps, coaching institutes and digital videos are making people money. INDIA MEIN 10-15% HAIN ELISA PROBLEM TEACHERS YA DIGITAL COURSES GRAMMAR SENTENCES ENGLISH RULES LEKIN ACTUAL COMMUNICATION PRACTICE AUR ISI PROBLEM KO SOLVE KIYA MY SIVI AI FOUNDERS NE IS APP MEIN AAP 24X7 AI TEACHER KE SATH ENGLISH MEIN BAAT SAKTE HO AI AAPKI MISTAKES CORRECT BASICALLY EK SPOKEN ENGLISH PRACTICE PARTNER MILTA HAI LOGON KO AND NOT JUST AI IS APP MEIN AAP DUSRE LEARNERS KE SATH LIVE CONNECT KARKE SPOKEN ENGLISH PRACTICE SAKTE HO TAKI AAPKI REAL LIFE SITUATIONS MEIN ENGLISH BOLNE KI PRACTICE HO JAYE ANYBODY CAN TRY EK RUPE TRIAL BAS ALREADY 50 LAKH DOWNLOADS MY SIVI AI [English Learning Market in India Over ₹20,000 Crore! Online courses, apps, coaching institutes and digital videos are making people money. IN INDIA 10-15% WHY IS THAT PROBLEM TEACHERS OR DIGITAL COURSES GRAMMAR SENTENCES ENGLISH RULES BUT ACTUAL COMMUNICATION PRACTICE AND THIS PROBLEM WAS SOLVED BY MY SIVI AI FOUNDERS IN THIS APP YOU CAN TALK IN ENGLISH WITH A 24X7 AI TEACHER AI CORRECTS YOUR MISTAKES BASICALLY PEOPLE GET A SPOKEN ENGLISH PRACTICE PARTNER AND NOT JUST AI IN THIS APP YOU CAN ALSO CONNECT LIVE WITH OTHER LEARNERS TO PRACTICE SPOKEN ENGLISH SO THAT YOU GET PRACTICE SPEAKING ENGLISH IN REAL LIFE SITUATIONS ANYBODY CAN TRY ONE RUPEE TRIAL ONLY ALREADY 50 LAKH DOWNLOADS MY SIVI AI]
summary: The presenter highlights that while India's English learning market is massive, only a small percentage of people can speak comfortably because traditional courses focus on grammar rules rather than real-life practice. He introduces MySivi AI as the solution, offering 24/7 practice with an AI teacher that corrects mistakes instantly, as well as live practice with other learners. Viewers are encouraged to try the app with a 1-rupee trial offer.
